base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rival_blue — a character from 1996 pokemon red blue. Blue (Gary) — rival. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Blue (Gary) — rival; 6 scripted encounters across game
